message:
feat(events,replay,server): add incident-bounded and as-of historical replay modes

Extend attention event replay with two new historical replay modes: incident-bounded
replay (--events-incident / incident_id) reconstructs context around a durable incident
timeline with configurable window-before/after bounds, and as-of replay (--events-as-of /
as_of) reconstructs the most recent bounded attention context at or before a timestamp.
Refactor BuildEventsOutput from PrintEvents for shared CLI/HTTP use; update server.go
to delegate to BuildEventsOutput with proper HTTP status propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -100,6 +100,9 @@ const (
 	// ErrCodeInternalError indicates an unexpected internal error.
 	ErrCodeInternalError = "INTERNAL_ERROR"
 
+	// ErrCodeNotFound indicates a requested durable resource was not found.
+	ErrCodeNotFound = "NOT_FOUND"
+
 	// ErrCodePermissionDenied indicates insufficient permissions.
 	ErrCodePermissionDenied = "PERMISSION_DENIED"
